title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Paytm Money Capital India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Paytm Money Capital India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Paytm Money Capital India are looking for an experienced Risk Analyst based out of Chandigarh. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Paytm Money Capital India:
Paytm Money Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Paytm Money Capital India!
